basic_details.job_title: TGPSC AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 222 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.department: Transport, Roads and Buildings (TR&B) Department, Telangana
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via TGPSC website after OTR registration)
basic_details.short_information: Telangana Public Service Commission is recruiting 222 Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) posts with B.E./B.Tech Civil Engineering qualification, last date 13 July 2026.

important_dates.admit_card_date: 7 days prior to examination date (up to 5:00 PM on previous day)
important_dates.tentative schedule of examination: October 2026 (Exact date to be notified separately)

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay non-refundable Application Processing Fee and Examination Fee through online mode only. The fee once remitted shall not be refunded or adjusted under any circumstances. Unless full payment of both fees (wherever applicable) is made, the candidature will not be considered.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years and maximum of 44 years as on 01/07/2026. (Note: As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Dept., Dt.18/05/2026, the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years from 34 years to 44 years.) Maximum age indicated is for Unreserved (OC) candidates. No person shall be eligible if he/she has reached superannuation age after availing eligible age relaxations as on 01/07/2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification (02/06/2026). Only candidates who have registered OTR on the TGPSC website are eligible to apply. Applicants belonging to other States are not entitled to any kind of reservation.
qualification.nationality: Citizen of India / Subject of Nepal or Bhutan / Tibetan Refugee (came before 01-01-1962) / Person of Indian origin migrated from specified countries - with eligibility certificate from Govt. of India where applicable.
qualification.education_qualification: Must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a University in India established or incorporated under a Central Act or Telangana State Act, or from an institution recognized by UGC / AICTE, or Associate Member of the Institution of Engineers (A.M.I.E.).

vacancy_details.Description: Locomotor Disability, Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, Muscular Dystrophy

Combination of disabilities; if eligible candidates of a particular PH category are not available, vacancies will be interchanged among PH categories as per G.O.MS.No.96, GA (Ser.D) Dept., Dt.22/07/2019. All disabled categories can apply.

pwd_wise_breakdown.description: Locomotor Disability, Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, Muscular Dystrophy

Combination of disabilities; if eligible candidates of a particular PH category are not available, vacancies will be interchanged among PH categories as per G.O.MS.No.96, GA (Ser.D) Dept., Dt.22/07/2019. All disabled categories can apply.

category_wise_vacancy.Description: Combination of disabilities; if eligible candidates of a particular PH category are not available, vacancies will be interchanged among PH categories as per G.O.MS.No.96, GA (Ser.D) Dept., Dt.22/07/2019. All disabled categories can apply.

selection_process: Selection will be made through Written Examination (Objective Type) conducted via CBRT (Computer Based Recruitment Test) or OMR-based Offline mode

as decided by the Commission. The mode of examination will be notified through web note/press note and in the Hall Ticket. Final selection is subject to document verification and medical fitness. There shall be no waiting list.
The examination consists of two papers totalling 450 marks. Paper-I is General Studies and General Abilities (150 questions
150 minutes) in bilingual (English & Telugu). Paper-II is Civil Engineering – Degree Level (150 questions

150 minutes) in English only. Qualifying marks: OC/Sports/EWS – minimum 40%; BC – minimum 35%; SC/ST/PH – minimum 30%. Mere securing qualifying marks does not vest any right for selection. In case of multi-session CBRT
scores will be normalized as per the Commission's formula (Annexure-VII).

Shortlisted candidates will be called for verification of original certificates. Candidates failing to produce originals will not be allowed to proceed. Government employees must produce No Objection Certificate from their Head of Office/Department.
Appointment of selected candidates is subject to being declared medically fit in the appropriate Medical Examination. The candidate should be of sound health
free from any bodily defect or infirmity.
TSPSC AEE Syllabus and Exam Pattern 2026
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the Commission's website (https://www.tgpsc.gov.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the TGPSC website to obtain their TGPSC ID. OTR is not considered an application for the post.
Step-by-Step Application Process:
Step I: Register for OTR at https://www.tgpsc.gov.in (if not already registered) to obtain TGPSC ID. Verify all bio-data details carefully.

Step II: Login using TGPSC ID and Date of Birth, enter OTP received on registered mobile, verify pre-filled details from OTR (Name, DOB, Qualifications, Community, Gender, Disability etc.), and select examination centre.
Step III: Preview the application for correctness, then click "SAVE & PAYMENT" to proceed to online fee payment via Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI.
Step IV: After fee payment, a PDF application will be generated. Download and save the PDF. Note the Reference ID Number for future correspondence.
Documents/Files Required to be Uploaded:
Recent colour passport-size photograph (not older than 3 months before last date) – JPG/PNG, 100kb–200kb
Scanned specimen signature – JPG/PNG, 20kb–30kb
PDF copies of certificates as required (educational qualifications, community, OTR documents); certificates already uploaded in OTR need not be uploaded again
Documents to be Produced at the time of Certificate Verification / Joining:
SSC / CBSE / ICSE certificate in support of Date of Birth
Printout of online application form (PDF)
School Study Certificate (1st to 7th Class) or Certificate of Residence from competent authority for the same period
All certificates and mark sheets of educational qualification (10th, Intermediate/12th, B.E./B.Tech Civil Engineering)
Community Certificate for SC/ST issued by Revenue Authority not below the rank of Tahsildar, Telangana Government, in the name of the applicant with Father's/Mother's name
Community Certificate for BCs (BC-A/B/C/D/E) issued by Revenue Authority not below Tahsildar, Telangana Government, obtained through Mee-seva
Non-Creamy Layer Certificate for BCs in Form-VIIB from Revenue Authority not below Tahsildar/RDO, Telangana Government, in the name of the applicant with Father's/Mother's name

Income and Asset Certificate for EWS reservation, issued by Tahsildar, Telangana Government, for the financial year prior to the year of application, in the name of the applicant with Parent's/Spouse's name
Disability Certificate in SADAREM format from competent medical authority for PH/PwD candidates
No Objection Certificate from Head of Office/Department for Government employees
Service Certificate (if claiming age relaxation as Government employee)
Certificate claiming sports reservation (Form 1/2/3/4 as applicable)
Certificate claiming Ex-servicemen age relaxation
Declaration by unemployed (for claiming examination fee exemption)
Photo Identity Proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport / Driving License / Service ID / Bank Passbook with photograph / PAN Card
Community, Nativity and Date of Birth Certificate

DO NOT send any document directly to the Commission. All correspondence is through the Commission's website only. For technical problems, contact 040-23120301 / 040-23120302 / 040-22445566 / 040-67445566 (10:30 AM to 5:00 PM on working days) or email [email protected].
Apply Online at: https://www.tgpsc.gov.in → Online Application Link → Login with TGPSC ID & DOB

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Telangana Public Service Commission, Hyderabad has officially released Notification No. 01/G/RB/2026 dated 02/06/2026 for General Recruitment to the post of Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) in Transport, Roads and Buildings Department. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, Multi Zone-wise vacancy breakup, PwBD reservation, application fee, scheme of examination, syllabus, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. The notification is available on the official TGPSC website. Download TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Telangana Public Service Commission is recruiting 222 Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) posts with B.E./B.Tech Civil Engineering qualification, last date 13 July 2026.

rows.telangana_public_service_commission_tgps: Transport, Roads and Buildings (TR&B) Department, Telangana
Online only (via TGPSC website after OTR registration)
Written Examination – Objective Type (OMR / CBRT mode) + Medical Examination
One Time Registration (OTR) on TGPSC website (https://www.tgpsc.gov.in) before applying

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date & Time for Online Application (including Fee Payment)

rows.date: 7 days prior to examination date (up to 5:00 PM on previous day)
October 2026 (Exact date to be notified separately)

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 222 provisional vacancies have been announced for the post of Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) in Transport, Roads and Buildings Department. These are distributed across Multi Zone-I and Multi Zone-II with reservations for OC, EWS, BC-A, BC-B, BC-C, BC-D, BC-E, SC, ST and horizontal reservation for Sports and Persons with Disabilities (VH, HH, OH, MH). Carried forward (CF) vacancies from previous recruitments are included. The number of vacancies is subject to variation on intimation from the department concerned. PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) - Categories Eligible

tables.caption: PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) - Categories Eligible

rows.description: Locomotor Disability, Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims, Muscular Dystrophy

Combination of disabilities; if eligible candidates of a particular PH category are not available, vacancies will be interchanged among PH categories as per G.O.MS.No.96, GA (Ser.D) Dept., Dt.22/07/2019. All disabled categories can apply.

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification (02/06/2026). Only candidates who have registered OTR on the TGPSC website are eligible to apply. Applicants belonging to other States are not entitled to any kind of reservation.

rows.details: Citizen of India / Subject of Nepal or Bhutan / Tibetan Refugee (came before 01-01-1962) / Person of Indian origin migrated from specified countries - with eligibility certificate from Govt. of India where applicable.
One Time Registration (OTR) on TGPSC website (https://www.tgpsc.gov.in) is mandatory before applying. OTR alone is NOT an application for the post.

Must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a University in India established or incorporated under a Central Act or Telangana State Act, or from an institution recognized by UGC / AICTE, or Associate Member of the Institution of Engineers (A.M.I.E.).
Degrees obtained through Open Universities / Distance Education mode must have recognition from UGC / AICTE / Distance Education Bureau. Proof of recognition rests with the applicant.

The result of the requisite educational qualification must have been declared by the concerned University as on the date of notification (02/06/2026). Mere conduct of examination or processing of result does not fulfill the requirement.
95% reservation for local candidates applicable for Multi Zone-I and Multi Zone-II posts separately as per G.O.Ms.No.124 GA (SPF-MC) Dept., Dt.30/08/2018.
Persons already in Government Service must inform their Head of Office/Department in writing that they have applied, and must submit a No Objection Certificate to the Commission when required.

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years and maximum of 44 years as on 01/07/2026. (Note: As per G.O.Ms.No.86, G.A.(Ser.A) Dept., Dt.18/05/2026, the upper age limit has been raised by 10 years from 34 years to 44 years.) Maximum age indicated is for Unreserved (OC) candidates. No person shall be eligible if he/she has reached superannuation age after availing eligible age relaxations as on 01/07/2026.

rows.age_limit_relaxation: Up to 5 years based on length of regular service (Employees of Corporations, Municipalities etc. are NOT eligible)
3 years + length of service rendered in Armed Forces (applicable only for those released other than by dismissal/discharge for misconduct or inefficiency)
3 years + length of service rendered in NCC (applicable for whole-time Cadet Corps Instructors recruited on or after 01/01/1963, having served not less than 6 months)

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Candidates are required to pay non-refundable Application Processing Fee and Examination Fee through online mode only. The fee once remitted shall not be refunded or adjusted under any circumstances. Unless full payment of both fees (wherever applicable) is made, the candidature will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through Written Examination (Objective Type) conducted via CBRT (Computer Based Recruitment Test) or OMR-based Offline mode, as decided by the Commission. The mode of examination will be notified through web note/press note and in the Hall Ticket. Final selection is subject to document verification and medical fitness. There shall be no waiting list. Stage 1 – Written Examination (Objective Type) The examination consists of two papers totalling 450 marks. Paper-I is General Studies and General Abilities (150 questions, 150 marks, 150 minutes) in bilingual (English & Telugu). Paper-II is Civil Engineering – Degree Level (150 questions, 300 marks, 150 minutes) in English only. Qualifying marks: OC/Sports/EWS – minimum 40%; BC – minimum 35%; SC/ST/PH – minimum 30%. Mere securing qualifying marks does not vest any right for selection. In case of multi-session CBRT, scores will be normalized as per the Commission's formula (Annexure-VII). Stage 2 – Document Verification Shortlisted candidates will be called for verification of original certificates. Candidates failing to produce originals will not be allowed to proceed. Government employees must produce No Objection Certificate from their Head of Office/Department. Stage 3 – Medical Examination Appointment of selected candidates is subject to being declared medically fit in the appropriate Medical Examination. The candidate should be of sound health, active habits, free from any bodily defect or infirmity. TSPSC AEE Syllabus and Exam Pattern 2026

content_sections.heading: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 - Multi Zone-wise Vacancy & District Details
content_sections.text: The post is classified as Multi-Zonal. Local reservation (95%) is applicable separately for Multi Zone-I and Multi Zone-II. Candidates must apply for the zone where they qualify as a local candidate as per their study/residence history.

rows.districts_covered: Kumrambheem Asifabad, Mancherial, Peddapalli, Jayashankar Bhupalapalli, Mulugu, Adilabad, Nirmal, Nizamabad, Jagityal, Karimnagar, Rajanna Sircilla, Siddipet, Medak, Kamareddy, Bhadradri Kothagudem, Khammam, Mahabubabad, Hanumakonda (Warangal Urban), Warangal (Warangal Rural)
Suryapet, Nalgonda, Bhongir-Yadadri, Jangaon, Medchal-Malkajgiri, Hyderabad, Ranga Reddy, Sanga Reddy, Vikarabad, Mahaboobnagar, Narayanpet, Jogulamba-Gadwal, Wanaparthi, Nagar Kurnool

content_sections.heading: Examination Centres for TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The objective type examination will be held at the following centres (subject to change by the Commission). Request for change of centre will not be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Who should NOT apply for TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates who do not hold a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering (B.E./B.Tech Civil) from a UGC/AICTE recognized University/Institution as on 02/06/2026. Other engineering branches are not eligible. Candidates whose Civil Engineering degree result had not been declared by the concerned University as on 02/06/2026, even if the examination was conducted or result processing was in progress. Candidates whose Civil Engineering degree was obtained through Open University / Distance Education mode without UGC / AICTE / Distance Education Bureau recognition. Candidates born after 01/07/2008 (below 18 years as on 01/07/2026). Candidates born before 02/07/1982 (above 44 years as on 01/07/2026 for OC/General category) unless eligible for specific age relaxations, and even then, no one who reaches superannuation age after relaxation is eligible. Candidates belonging to other States who are seeking reservation benefits; inter-state candidates are not entitled to any reservation under Telangana rules. OBC candidates from the Creamy Layer applying under BC reservation; only Non-Creamy Layer BC candidates with a valid NCL certificate from a Telangana Tahsildar are entitled to BC reservation. Candidates who are Government employees of Corporations, Municipalities etc. seeking age relaxation under the "Government Employee" category; only regular Telangana State Government employees are eligible for that relaxation. Candidates who do not have a valid TGPSC OTR (One Time Registration); OTR is mandatory before the application can be submitted. Candidates who submit applications through any mode other than the prescribed online mode on the TGPSC website.

content_sections.heading: Common mistakes / What to check before applying TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Not completing OTR (One Time Registration) before applying; the application cannot be submitted without a valid TGPSC ID generated through OTR. Failing to correctly update PH/Disability status in OTR; if PH status is not updated in OTR, the applicant will not be considered for PH vacancies even if eligible. Not verifying that the result of the qualifying examination was declared by the University on or before 02/06/2026; "appeared" or "awaiting result" does not satisfy the educational qualification requirement. Applying for the wrong Multi Zone (Zone-I or Zone-II) without verifying local candidate eligibility based on study/residence history; local reservation (95%) is applied zone-wise. Uploading a photograph older than 3 months before the last date of application, or uploading in incorrect file size (Photo: 100kb–200kb; Signature: 20kb–30kb) or format (JPG/PNG only). BC candidates failing to obtain a fresh Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) certificate in the prescribed Form-VIIB from a Telangana Tahsildar/RDO in the name of the applicant with Father's/Mother's name; old or improperly issued NCL certificates will result in candidature being treated as OC/General. Claiming exemption from Examination Fee (Rs.120/-) as "unemployed" without having a valid declaration; employed candidates in any Government/PSU/Corporations must pay the examination fee. Not clicking the "CONFIRM & SUBMIT" button after filling and previewing the application; unless this button is clicked, application particulars will not be saved in the database. Not noting down the Reference ID Number from the PDF application form for future correspondence, and not downloading/saving a copy of the submitted PDF application. Bringing electronic gadgets (mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, Bluetooth devices, pen drives, tablets, etc.) to the examination centre; these are strictly banned and will attract penal action including imprisonment of 3 to 7 years and fine of Rs.5,000 to Rs.1,00,000 under Act No.25/1997.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shall apply online through the Commission's website (https://www.tgpsc.gov.in) only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the TGPSC website to obtain their TGPSC ID. OTR is not considered an application for the post. Step-by-Step Application Process: Step I: Register for OTR at https://www.tgpsc.gov.in (if not already registered) to obtain TGPSC ID. Verify all bio-data details carefully. Step II: Login using TGPSC ID and Date of Birth, enter OTP received on registered mobile, verify pre-filled details from OTR (Name, DOB, Qualifications, Community, Gender, Disability etc.), and select examination centre. Step III: Preview the application for correctness, then click "SAVE & PAYMENT" to proceed to online fee payment via Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI. Step IV: After fee payment, a PDF application will be generated. Download and save the PDF. Note the Reference ID Number for future correspondence. Documents/Files Required to be Uploaded: Recent colour passport-size photograph (not older than 3 months before last date) – JPG/PNG, 100kb–200kb Scanned specimen signature – JPG/PNG, 20kb–30kb PDF copies of certificates as required (educational qualifications, community, OTR documents); certificates already uploaded in OTR need not be uploaded again Documents to be Produced at the time of Certificate Verification / Joining: SSC / CBSE / ICSE certificate in support of Date of Birth Printout of online application form (PDF) School Study Certificate (1st to 7th Class) or Certificate of Residence from competent authority for the same period All certificates and mark sheets of educational qualification (10th, Intermediate/12th, B.E./B.Tech Civil Engineering) Community Certificate for SC/ST issued by Revenue Authority not below the rank of Tahsildar, Telangana Government, in the name of the applicant with Father's/Mother's name Community Certificate for BCs (BC-A/B/C/D/E) issued by Revenue Authority not below Tahsildar, Telangana Government, obtained through Mee-seva Non-Creamy Layer Certificate for BCs in Form-VIIB from Revenue Authority not below Tahsildar/RDO, Telangana Government, in the name of the applicant with Father's/Mother's name Income and Asset Certificate for EWS reservation, issued by Tahsildar, Telangana Government, for the financial year prior to the year of application, in the name of the applicant with Parent's/Spouse's name Disability Certificate in SADAREM format from competent medical authority for PH/PwD candidates No Objection Certificate from Head of Office/Department for Government employees Service Certificate (if claiming age relaxation as Government employee) Certificate claiming sports reservation (Form 1/2/3/4 as applicable) Certificate claiming Ex-servicemen age relaxation Declaration by unemployed (for claiming examination fee exemption) Photo Identity Proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport / Driving License / Service ID / Ba

faq.question: Q1. What is TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 is the Telangana Public Service Commission notification for 222 Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil) posts in the Transport, Roads and Buildings Department.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TGPSC AEE Civil 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 222 vacancies are available, distributed across Multi Zone-I (112) and Multi Zone-II (110) with reservations for various categories including SC, ST, BC, EWS, and PwBD.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering (B.E./B.Tech) from a recognized Indian University or institution recognized by UGC/AICTE or AMIE.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for TGPSC AEE Civil 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 44 years as of 01/07/2026 for OC candidates, with relaxations for SC/ST/BC, PwD, Ex-Servicemen, NCC instructors, and Telangana State Government employees as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026 selection process?
faq.answer: Selection includes a Written Examination (Objective Type – Paper I: General Studies & Aptitude, Paper II: Civil Engineering), followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for TGPSC AEE Civil Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must register for One Time Registration (OTR) on the TGPSC website, then apply online with the TGPSC ID and upload required documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for TGPSC AEE Civil 2026?
faq.answer: The application processing fee is ₹1,000 for OC & BC candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST/PwD candidates. The examination fee is ₹120 for employed candidates; unemployed applicants are exempted.

faq.question: Q8. When will the TGPSC AEE Civil 2026 online application start and end?
faq.answer: The online application opens on 06-06-2026 and closes on 13-07-2026 at 5:00 PM. Candidates must complete OTR registration beforehand.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the TGPSC AEE Civil exam be conducted?
faq.answer: Examination centres include Hyderabad, Karimnagar, Khammam, Warangal, and Nizamabad, with the exact venue details mentioned in the hall ticket.

faq.question: Q10. Who should not apply for TGPSC AEE Civil 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates without a Civil Engineering degree, those whose result is pending, candidates from other engineering branches, underage/overage candidates, non-Telangana locals seeking reservation, and those without OTR registration should not apply.
